# Phase 10.0.25 Provenance Authenticity Plan

Phase: 10.0.25 - Constitutional Repository Provenance, Authenticity Certification & Cryptographic Trust Continuity Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only handoff note. Runtime remains disabled.

## Scope

Add governance-only doctrine for repository provenance, authenticity certification, cryptographic trust continuity, snapshot signing philosophy, identity continuity, restoration validation, fork/migration legitimacy, tamper-evidence custody, and trust-chain survivability.

## Repository State

Repository classification remains UNSTABLE because unrelated runtime/app drift, generated Prisma artifacts, many untracked paths, and branch-ahead divergence are present. This plan does not clean, revert, stage, commit, repair, or mutate those changes.

## Path Isolation

Allowed paths for this step:

- `docs/communication-infrastructure/CONSTITUTIONAL-REPOSITORY-PROVENANCE-DOCTRINE.md`
- `docs/communication-infrastructure/AUTHENTICITY-CERTIFICATION-FRAMEWORK.md`
- `docs/communication-infrastructure/CRYPTOGRAPHIC-TRUST-CONTINUITY-DOCTRINE.md`

- `docs/communication-infrastructure/FORK-MIGRATION-LEGITIMACY-STANDARDS.md`

## Non-Runtime Constraint

This plan creates no runtime enablement, APIs, providers, adapters, credentials, OAuth, Prisma/Supabase changes, Twilio/email execution, background jobs, signing automation, verification automation, repository repair, staging, commits, branch repair, destructive git operations, deployment authority, or infrastructure activation.
